overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring Arthur Morgan walking through tall prairie grass at night. The character moves steadily through open wilderness under a bright full moon, with a distant forested tree line visible against a deep blue night sky scattered with clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland under full moon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant forested horizon

entered.detail: bright full moon illuminating the night sky directly ahead
tall green grass swaying as the character moves through it
dense dark forest forming a continuous tree line on the horizon
sparse clouds drifting across the dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic third-person view of Arthur Morgan walking through an open prairie at night. The full moon hangs directly ahead in the clear sky, casting a cool blue light over the tall grass that sways with each step. A distant forested tree line marks the horizon while scattered clouds drift slowly overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie grassland with moon shifting position

events.description: moon shifts from center to left side of frame, changing the angle of illumination on the landscape

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace through the grassland as the camera angle shifts relative to the moon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the prairie as the moon appears to shift toward the left side of the sky, altering the lighting angle on the grass. The distant forest remains visible ahead while the clouds drift across the changing sky positions.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie grassland with moon to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady walk through the grassland as the moon settles on the right side of the sky

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the moon has moved to the right side of the frame, continuing to bathe the prairie in soft blue light. The character maintains a steady walking pace through the tall grass, with the forested tree line now appearing more prominently on the left horizon as the journey continues through the open wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie as the celestial lighting shifts across the open wilderness. It begins with Arthur Morgan walking through tall, swaying grass under a full moon positioned directly ahead, which casts a cool blue glow over the landscape toward a distant forested tree line. As he continues his steady pace, the moon gradually shifts toward the left side of the sky, altering the angle of light hitting the terrain while clouds drift slowly overhead. The scene then evolves as the moon moves further to the right side of the frame, bathing the prairie in soft blue light before the forested horizon becomes more prominent on the left.
